sanskrit: स्वयमेवात्मानमात्मानं वेत्थ त्वं पुरुषोत्तम । भूतभावन भूतेश देवदेव जगत्पते ॥
transliteration: svayam evātmanātmānaṃ vettha tvaṃ puruṣottama | bhūta-bhāvana bhūteśa deva-deva jagat-pate ||
literal_meaning: You alone, by Your own self, know Yourself, O Supreme Person; O origin of beings, O Lord of beings, O God of gods, O Lord of the universe.
contextual_meaning: Arjuna concedes that ultimate self-knowledge is relational and cannot be appropriated by intellect alone; it is revealed only within an I-Thou devotion that transcends objectification.
psychological_state: A moment of ego-dissolution where the need to cognitively map the Other is relinquished, producing a paradoxical sense of intimacy-through-not-knowing.
trigger_scenario: A high-achieving client realizes that no amount of self-analysis or external credentials grants access to their core worth; only vulnerable relational presence reveals who they are.
anchor_text: Know the Divine through loving surrender, not through thought alone.
